grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Comprehensive coverage of 8 key areas including governance, client care, training, file management, and cyber security

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Detailed evidence lists for each area including training records, complaints register, SRO details, file review records, etc.

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'CQS Senior Responsible Officer (SRO)' with deputies/cover in governance section

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Clearly states need for Protocol compliance monitoring procedure and regular compliance reviews

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section 6 on information security covering cyber policy, fraud prevention, phishing training, and Cyber Essentials

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Section 2 covers supervision and file review requirements, Section 8 covers file/case management with detailed requirements
